sourceMovie.title: Courage Under Fire
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Courage Under Fire works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Hurt Locker
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Courage Under Fire clicked for you, The Hurt Locker (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Courage Under Fire?
faq.answer: Try The Hurt Locker, The Manchurian Candidate, Behind Enemy Lines—each shares DNA with Courage Under Fire while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Courage Under Fire?
faq.answer: Courage Under Fire (1996) is best described as Drama, Thriller, Mystery, War. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Courage Under Fire worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
